headline: Verano Announces $195 Million Senior Secured Term Loan Refinancing Agreement to Fund Company’s Strategic Growth Initiatives

headline: Houston, We Have Liftoff: Tuttle Capital Launches Space Industry Income Blast ETF (SPCI)
summary: New Actively Managed ETF Aims to Give Investors Concentrated Exposure to Space Industry Equities with Weekly Income Generation Through a Disciplined Put Credit Spread StrategyTuttle Capital Management announces the launch of the Tuttle Capital Space Industry Income Blast ETF (CBOE: SPCI), a first-of-its-kind fund combining full upside participation in the Syntax Space Industry Index with systematic weekly income generation.SPCI is an actively managed ETF that seeks to provide approximately 100%.

content.title: Houston, We Have Liftoff: Tuttle Capital Launches Space Industry Income Blast ETF (SPCI)
content.summary: New Actively Managed ETF Aims to Give Investors Concentrated Exposure to Space Industry Equities with Weekly Income Generation Through a Disciplined Put Credit Spread StrategyTuttle Capital Management announces the launch of the Tuttle Capital Space Industry Income Blast ETF (CBOE: SPCI), a first-of-its-kind fund combining full upside participation in the Syntax Space Industry Index with systematic weekly income generation.SPCI is an actively managed ETF that seeks to provide approximately 100%.
